Records.description: Two-loop on-shell self-energy (4-propagator 'eye' topology: two parallel $M$ lines forming an inner bubble on one side of an outer triangle whose remaining two edges carry mass $m$) with $q^2=-m^2$ (Euclidean), contributing to the pole-to-MSbar mass relation of the Higgs boson (Broadhurst:1987ei). The $\varepsilon$-expansion goes up to the finite term and involves $\operatorname{Li}_2$ of the conformal variable $y$ (with $y$ related to $z=M^2/m^2$) together with the special Clausen value $\operatorname{Cl}_2(\pi/3)$ entering the on-shell one-loop bubble. Result uses dilogarithms with unusual ('cyclotronic') arguments $\xi=(1-\sqrt{3}t)/(1+\sqrt{3}t)$.
Records.familyName: 2-mass 2-loop 2-point on-shell master integral for Higgs pole-to-MSbar mass relation (4 propagators)
